sys_script_fix.description:
NOTE: update in 2.8.4 | 2023-11-06 | STRY0146507 - Certification Failed Test Results - Provided the updates required to keep in product
Release Introduced: 2.7 - This can be run to close all open requests for all closed tasks
Purpose: - Tasks were closed and requests were left open. - The issue has been resolved and this fix script closed all requests left open due to the bug. - This script was left to correct this issue on all Task Requests if the issue is ever encountered again.
Validation: - After running open list of all Requests on all closed tasks should be closed - Open the Request table x_153465_discovert_tasker_requests_list.do - Set this fitler in the URL: u_status=In progress^parent.stateIN7,4,3' - If any rows are returned, there are still open requests on closed tasks
At the start of the script a log entry will show the number of requests on closed tasks that are not cloed: - 'Fix Script - Tasker 2.7-Close Requests on closed Task - Your system was analyzed and ' + requestNotClosedCount + ' requests with closed tasks are still in progress. Closing the opened requests...'
At the end of the script if all Requests are closed the following note will be logged: - "Fix Script - Tasker 2.7-Close Requests on closed Task - Completed - all Requests on completed tasks have been marked coimplete."
At the end of the script if any Requests on closed tasks remain open the following note will be logged: - "Fix Script - Tasker 2.7-Close Requests on closed Task - Completed - Not all requests were marked complete. " + numRequestsClosed + " of " + requestNotClosedCount + " were closed. To see requests still remain open, run this query on the request table: u_status=In progress^parent.stateIN7,4,3"
If any Errors occurs while processing Tasks, the error will be written to the log in this format: Log Level - Error Message - "Task Number - Tasker Number - Task Name:[taskNumberAndName] - Error in 'Tasker 2.7-Close Requests on closed Task' - exception: " + e);
This script was left to correct this issue on all Task Requests if the issue is ever encountered again.
sys_script_fix.name: Tasker 2.7-Close Requests on closed Task
